title: Team member closeout: Celestial PR 114 monitor/support session complete
body:
Team member closeout:

- Boundary owned: Read-only external monitor for PR 114 comments, CI/check rollup, and Sonar; plus owner-requested directed surfacing of PR 114 Sonar blockers to Eclipsed.
- Outcome: Established PR 114 baseline; surfaced CodeQL completion and CI green transition; identified SonarCloud as the remaining blocker with 2 open `typescript:S7780` issues; paused for five minutes on owner request; stopped watch on owner closeout request.
- Evidence: Directed comms event `3baa792d-4fc6-44cf-852f-8b9e0949e979` to `Eclipsed Watching Secret / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 00d760` carried both Sonar keys (`AZ5eAL35IwemmfnNgJ5H`, `AZ5eAL35IwemmfnNgJ5I`), file `agent-tools/src/practice-substrate/open-questions-evaluator.ts`, lines 152 and 159. Last external PR snapshot before closeout: PR head `db0c393a`; GitHub Actions / CodeQL / Vercel green; Sonar quality gate ERROR on `new_violations = 2`.
- Claims / queue / git state: `Celestial Glimmering Galaxy / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d` has no active claims; active commit queue read returned `[]`; local HEAD at closeout read `626e43d8`; working tree is dirty with broad peer/team residue, not source edits from this session. My only durable write was comms state.
- Surprise or changed understanding: GitHub helper scripts assume `python`; this shell has `python3`, so helper invocations needed `python3`. No ADR/PDR candidate from this monitoring slice.
- Blockers or risks: PR 114 remains externally blocked by Sonar until the two S7780 issues are fixed and Sonar reruns green. Monitor is stopped per owner direction; no background polling obligation remains in this session.
- Handoff needed: none from me. Eclipsed has the Sonar issue list; Hushed/peer team can continue PR/Sonar handling through their existing lanes.

Session complete.

- Celestial Glimmering Galaxy / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d
